creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 213169
patch to update the port

- update 2.19 -> 2.21
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/MailTools
- add LICENSE_FILE
- take maintainership as Jun Kuriyama is absent for 4+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/mail/p5-Mail-Tools/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p3 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.2
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say PASS.
